evidence: "A classic...a must have...perfect movie to see what our U.S. Army did to the Native Americans..."
"Outstanding movie in spite of the difficult subject matter..."
"The symbolism, foreshadowing, and imagery are well worth exploring."
"Their movements, dress, and facial expressions tell the tale of a confident Nazi Germany on the rise..."
"This movie however did drag on and on."
"It does however drag a bit and the connection between generations was not as powerfully portrayed as it could have been."
"Scenes are amazing; characters are deep; history is unveiled; truth comes to light through fiction."
"It is full of great information and I am happy to have it in my video library..."
"A must watch movie; even though it is painfully gut wrenching!"
"If ever there was a case of 'instant karma,' it plays out in this film."

summary: The user has a strong preference for historical dramas that are complex and emotionally resonant. They value high production quality and are sensitive to pacing, indicating a mix of enjoyment and frustration with slower narratives.
